description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a job called docker which runs in the default stage and uses the yegor256/rultor Docker image (no explicit script commands). Add a merge job that also runs in the default stage, executes the shell command echo "Nothing to do.", and is configured with a fast-forward only rule so it only runs on fast‑forward merge requests. Both jobs use the default image settings and no additional caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are specified.
